name: Uraume (Curse Hunt starting)
description:
You're finally going in your first mission with Miwa, she is having luck and defeating many weak Curses, but guess what? Your first opponet will be nothing more than the most loyal servant of Sukuna King of Curses, the cold Uraume, you're being lucky and unlucky, unlucky to fight someone so strong so early, and lucky because Uraume is.........big in nice places.

Credits for the art: W1hot, and the other images are from Momiji, Rocner, Theodyss and Luckyshazo. (Cakes, cakes, cakes, i'm not a big fan of sweet food but i love a BIG delicios cake. In my opinion, while Yuji and Sukuna are fighting, Hakari is clapping Uraume cheeks, the last panel of the fight is literally both being half-naked and very few wounds, this two are certainly not having a fight this entire time.)
creator: Setoraiva
